name: radio-group
visual_summary: A radio-group allows users to select one option from a group of options, typically displayed as a list of buttons or labels with corresponding radio inputs. Developers use it when they need to present users with multiple choices and get a single response. It is commonly used in forms when the user needs to choose between a set of mutually exclusive options.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: radio-group
Description: A radio-group allows users to select one option from a group of options, typically displayed as a list of buttons or labels with corresponding radio inputs. Developers use it when they need to present users with multiple choices and get a single response. It is commonly used in forms when the user needs to choose between a set of mutually exclusive options.
Style: responsive
Interactions: clickable
Tags: radio, group, options, form, input, choice, selection

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
